function.name: calculator
function.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression. Use for any arithmetic calculation, unit conversion involving math, percentages, tax calculations, etc.

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get current weather information for a city in Vietnam. Available cities: Hà Nội, Đà Nẵng, Hồ Chí Minh / Sài Gòn.

city.description: City name in Vietnamese. Example: 'Hà Nội', 'Đà Nẵng', 'Hồ Chí Minh'

function.name: search_knowledge
function.description: Deprecated alias of web_search (SearXNG). Prefer web_search, wikipedia_lookup, or arxiv_search for research.

function.name: remember_fact
function.description: Store a fact about the user in long-term memory. Use when the user tells you personal information, preferences, or asks you to remember something.

fact.description: The fact to remember. Example: 'User thích Python', 'Tên user là Minh'
